name: Iron Wolf
description:
A special drink bold and unrestrained in spirit. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Varka with "Thorny Lake" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.
Having tasted countless fine drinks, the Grand Master invites you to go all out and let your creativity run free. So you launch an unconventional kind of "offensive" just for him.
The first impact comes from mint's cool freshness and herbal notes, striking the palate on entry. Carefully preserved layers then move in to mask the raw strength of the Fire-Water at the core, delivering the decisive blow. Finally, Smetana brings up the rear, anchoring the finish with precision and leaving no loose ends.
In honor of the Grand Master and Mondstadt, you named this drink "Iron Wolf." The extraordinary, richly layered flavors of the drink were such a delight to the Grand Master, he then proceeded to guzzle it with unrestrained enjoyment.
